title: HazMiner code
author: Valkenborg, Bram
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
HazMiner is  a paragraph-based text mining method designed to document the location, timing and impact of GH through large language models across multiple languages and at various scales. Here we present the code used in the HazMiner publication.  
  Main code  
 
  miner.py: contains the first steps of the HazMiner methodology for downloading articles from GDELT (GDELT, 2025) and extract their text  
  extractor.py: contains all step to filter and extract hazard related information from the paragraphs and to cluster paragraphs into hazard events  
 
  Supporting code  
 
  core.py: the core functions supporting the HazMiner code  
  functions.py: other functions supporting the HazMiner code  
  config.py: configuration of HazMiner  
 
  More infromation on the  HazMiner dataset   
  More information on HazMiner: <future publication>
